rule.name: Suspicious DLL Loading from Temporary Directory
rule.notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.
Original Author: Florian Roth, Markus Neis SIGMA Title: Suspicious DLL Loading from Temporary Directory SIGMA Description: Detects DLL sideloading from temporary directories, a common technique used by attackers to execute malicious code through legitimate Windows executables
False positives: - Temporarily deployed software loading legitimate DLLs from temporary directories - Some installers and software packages
This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense

test.name: com.q1labs.semsources.cre.tests.AQL_Test
test.text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(CONCAT('file directory', '/', filename)) LIKE '%\temp\%' OR LOWER(CONCAT('file directory', '/', filename)) LIKE '%\users\public\%' OR LOWER(CONCAT('file directory', '/', filename)) LIKE '%\desktop\%' OR LOWER(CONCAT('file directory', '/', filename)) LIKE '%\downloads\%' OR LOWER(CONCAT('file directory', '/', filename)) LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%' OR LOWER(CONCAT('file directory', '/', filename)) LIKE '%\appdata\roaming\temp\%') AND LOWER(CONCAT('file directory', '/', filename)) LIKE '%.dll' AND (LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\wscript.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\cscript.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\mshta.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\rundll32.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\regsvr32.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\services.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\winlogon.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\spoolsv.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\lsass.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\svchost.exe' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\explorer.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\wscript.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\cscript.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\mshta.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\rundll32.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\regsvr32.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\services.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\winlogon.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\spoolsv.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\lsass.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\svchost.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\explorer.exe') AQL filter query

newevent.description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Original Author: Florian Roth, Markus Neis SIGMA Title: Suspicious DLL Loading from Temporary Directory SIGMA Description: Detects DLL sideloading from temporary directories, a common technique used by attackers to execute malicious code through legitimate Windows executables False positives: - Temporarily deployed software loading legitimate DLLs from temporary directories - Some installers and software packages This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
newevent.name: Suspicious DLL Loading from Temporary Directory
